refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital are overflowing with waste. The surrounding area appears to be littered with trash.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was appalled to see the trash bins outside overflowing with garbage. The smell was unbearable and it's a health hazard. The hospital should take immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are totally overflowing, it's really gross and smells bad.
